programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Adam and his guests, chef Kay-Lete Tan and writer Benjamin Law work wonders with sweet citrus.

programs.title: The Cook And The Chef
programs.desc: Simon and Maggie look at the value of growing your own food in the backyard and getting to know your local producers. Maggie creates a cake using her home-grown pumpkin and Simon coddles locally caught salmon.

programs.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programs.desc: Adam heads to Manchester to watch Manchester United in the Europa League and to explore the best matchday eats in this fast-changing global city. He takes on an epic seafood boil filled with prawns.

programs.title: Destination Flavour
programs.desc: This week, Adam finds premium wagyu beef, Renee meets a Michelin star chef who's set up shop in Port Douglas, and Lily hangs out with Luke Nguyen at the opening of his new restaurant.

programs.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programs.desc: Ainsley is joined by chefs Freddy and Lerato in the kitchen garden of Blicking Hall in Norfolk for a light-hearted cooking contest.

programs.title: Destination Flavour Singapore Bitesize
programs.desc: The best bits of Adam Liaw's travels in Singapore, as he explores its vibrant food scene.
